heading: Emanuel Jofre: Main Settings : Timecard
note: Vertical-specific: time-card, leave, overtime, deviated work schedule workflows. Maps form-template names to approval-task sequences. **Pay Period Start Date: 1/1/2005** + **Days In Pay Period: 14** — these drive date-math for every timecard. `<EmployeeStatus>` + `<HolidayFormFields>` XML control UI options.

dateHandlingRelevant.note: Bi-weekly pay period anchored on 2005-01-01. Timecard forms use these + the pay-period start/end field names below.

checkboxes.label: (1 checkbox — not fully captured, likely timecard feature enable flag)
